LamBox.Empty:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Empty
    type variables:  []
      constructors:

Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Nat
    type variables:  []
      constructors:
        zero (0 arg(s))
        suc (1 arg(s))
          n : Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}

Top.Unit:
  mutual inductive(s):
    Unit
    type variables:  []
      constructors: tt (0 arg(s))

Top.toNat:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Top.Unit{0}) → Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: λ _ →
            Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
              (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                 (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                    (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                       (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                          (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                             (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                   (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                      (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                         (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                            (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                               (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                  (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                     (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                        (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                           (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                              (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                 (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                    (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                       (Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                          (Agda.
                                                                           Builtin.
                                                                           Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                             (Agda.
                                                                              Builtin.
                                                                              Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                (Agda.
                                                                                 Builtin.
                                                                                 Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                   (Agda.
                                                                                    Builtin.
                                                                                    Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                      (Agda.
                                                                                       Builtin.
                                                                                       Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                         (Agda.
                                                                                          Builtin.
                                                                                          Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                            (Agda.
                                                                                             Builtin.
                                                                                             Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                               (Agda.
                                                                                                Builtin.
                                                                                                Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                  (Agda.
                                                                                                   Builtin.
                                                                                                   Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                     (Agda.
                                                                                                      Builtin.
                                                                                                      Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                        (Agda.
                                                                                                         Builtin.
                                                                                                         Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                           (Agda.
                                                                                                            Builtin.
                                                                                                            Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                              (Agda.
                                                                                                               Builtin.
                                                                                                               Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                 (Agda.
                                                                                                                  Builtin.
                                                                                                                  Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                    (Agda.
                                                                                                                     Builtin.
                                                                                                                     Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                       (Agda.
                                                                                                                        Builtin.
                                                                                                                        Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                          (Agda.
                                                                                                                           Builtin.
                                                                                                                           Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                             (Agda.
                                                                                                                              Builtin.
                                                                                                                              Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                (Agda.
                                                                                                                                 Builtin.
                                                                                                                                 Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                   (Agda.
                                                                                                                                    Builtin.
                                                                                                                                    Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                      (Agda.
                                                                                                                                       Builtin.
                                                                                                                                       Nat.Nat{0}{1}
                                                                                                                                         Agda.
                                                                                                                                         Builtin.
                                                                                                                                         Nat.Nat{0}{0})))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))))

Top.test:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: Agda.Builtin.Nat.Nat{0}
    body: Top.toNat □

Top.idUnit:
  constant declaration:
    type variables: []
    type: (Top.Unit{0}) → Top.Unit{0}
    body: □
